changes.comment: feat(fallback): FallbackDataSource now exposes `getMetricsSink()`, so a fallback source passed to the batch-processor's `run()` gets its `sqd_fallback_*` gauges registered on `/metrics` automatically — no manual `addMetricsSink(fallbackMetricsSink(src))` needed. `fallbackMetricsSink` is now idempotent per registry, so a leftover manual registration alongside the automatic one no longer throws on duplicate gauge names.
